content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported (`WallpaperGridView.swift:2`) and `HMHomeManager` instantiated (`WallpaperGridView.swift:6`), but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (`description.txt:1`).
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps that provide genuine home-automation functionality, and importing the framework in an unrelated wallpaper app may trigger review questions about why the entitlement is present. The `HMHomeManager` here is never used to display or control accessories — the only UI is a static wallpaper category list. Remove the HomeKit import and manager unless you add real home-related features, or expect reviewers to ask about it.
